ModMetaData.name: Military
ModMetaData.author: Anonymous
ModMetaData.description:
The Military mod brings a full command structure to your RimWorld colony.
Assign ranks from Recruit to Lieutenant and watch your soldiers earn promotions through real combat - kills gate progression, so only battle-hardened colonists climb the ranks.
Each rank grants meaningful stat bonuses: Privates shoot more accurately, Corporals move faster, Sergeants inspire nearby allies, and Lieutenants reduce their squad's aim time. Ranks also provide mood buffs - soldiers take pride in their position.
Set up patrol routes using the patrol assignment system - your Lieutenant designates waypoints, and assigned soldiers walk the route automatically, breaking off to engage nearby threats before returning to their post.
A dedicated Military tab gives you complete oversight of your fighting force - portraits, ranks, kill counts, progress toward promotion, equipped weapons, patrol status, and quick promote/demote actions all in one place.
Built for RimWorld 1.6.
Optional: [RH2] Rimmu-Nation2 - Clothing for enhanced Helix Corporation soldier appearance.
